title: Really fun CSS hover effects
description: Explores awesome CSS hover effects using transforms, transform-origin, and pseudo-elements with creative stacking context techniques.

title: CSS Before and After pseudo elements explained - part three: as design elements
description: Using ::before and ::after to create fun hover effects and design elements inspired by Codrops hover effect ideas.

title: Make this fun effect that follows your cursor (pure CSS)
description: Pure CSS hover and cursor-following effects using anchor positioning, pseudo-elements, and creative animation techniques.

title: Learn CSS Animation In 15 Minutes
description: Covers transition-based hover effects and keyframe animations for creating interactive hover states on elements.
